query: SELECT id, liverId, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, salesAmount, viewerCount FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId = 120001 AND DATE(livestreamDate) = '2026-02-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, liverId, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, salesAmount, viewerCount FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId = 120001 AND DATE(livestreamDate) = '2026-02-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 5;
